prose:
Built a three-dimensional structure for cysteine with chemkit’s `build-from-smiles` skill.

Method / provenance
• Property: 3 D Cartesian coordinates of a single, unoptimized conformer.
• Build tool: Open Babel 3.1.1 via `obabel --gen3d` (distance-geometry embedding and MMFF94 refinement).
• Input identifier: name “cysteine” → resolved to isomeric SMILES `C([C@@H](C(=O)O)N)S`.
• Resolver / database: PubChem (CID 5862; URL https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/compound/5862).
• Environment: gas phase; no quantum-mechanical optimization performed.
• Charge 0, multiplicity 1 (closed-shell neutral assumed).
• Convergence / warnings: structure built successfully; no warnings emitted.

Output
• Atom count: 14 (C 3, H 7, N 1, O 2, S 1).
• Coordinates written to:
  /Users/evane/Desktop/Research/Argonne/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/build-validation/cysteine/20260619-134610_cysteine_build/agent_call_01.xyz

This geometry is provided for further modeling or visualization; it is a computed structure, not an experimentally derived one.
